name: loom-interface-design
description: Key-free cross-modal (GUI/TUI/CLI) UX design generator — emits portable DESIGN.md + ui-flows.md.

interface.shortDescription: Key-free cross-modal (GUI/TUI/CLI) UX and visual design generator
interface.longDescription: Design a product's interface in any modality: design-system emits a DESIGN.md of color/typography/layout/component tokens, interaction-flows maps navigation and UX into a ui-flows.md with Mermaid + ASCII wireframes, and design-critic runs an adversarial writer-not-judge panel for surface gaps (undrawn states, dead-ends, a11y) per Nielsen. Governed by PRINCIPLES.md; using-loom-interface-design routes the skills.
defaultPrompt: Design the UI/UX for this feature.
Generate a visual design system for this product.
Map the interaction flows for this TUI.
